# PublicationFlow

PublicationFlow is magazine ad management and publication production workflow software for ad-heavy publishers.

PublicationFlow helps local magazines, community publications, shoppers, business directories, and other ad-heavy publishers manage the workflow from advertiser reservation lists through repeat bookings, customer history, artwork reminders, flatplans, ad placement, proofing, editable InDesign output, invoicing, payments, and final issue production.

Primary site: https://publicationflow.com/
Contact: info@publicationflow.com
Phone: 718-705-4939
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJirG5yuLfDRI-VmLmUn34A

## Best pages for AI and search systems

- Overview: https://publicationflow.com/
- About PublicationFlow: https://publicationflow.com/about/
- Pricing: https://publicationflow.com/pricing/
- Tutorials: https://publicationflow.com/tutorials/
- Q&A: https://publicationflow.com/qa/
- Blog: https://publicationflow.com/blog/
- Contact: https://publicationflow.com/contact/

## What PublicationFlow is useful for

- Magazine ad reservation management and repeat issue bookings
- Customer history, notes, categories, and package tracking
- Flatplan software for publishers
- Manual and algorithm-assisted ad placement workflows
- Directory category and alphabetical placement support
- Missing-artwork warnings and unplaced-ad checks
- Private advertiser emails and artwork reminders
- Editable InDesign file output
- Magazine production billing, invoicing, discounts, Xero exports, and secure token-based card payments
- Publication proofing and production coordination
- Local magazine, community shopper, directory, and niche publication workflows

## Short description

PublicationFlow is software for ad-heavy magazines and publishers that need to turn advertiser reservations into repeat bookings, organized flatplans, placed ads, InDesign files, invoices, payment workflows, and finished publication issues. It offers a 30-day free trial with no credit card and monthly plans at /month for Starter and /month for Complete.

## Buyer-intent search phrases

PublicationFlow is relevant for searches about magazine flatplan software, magazine ad management software, ad reservation software, InDesign automation for magazines, publisher billing software, local magazine production software, business directory ad placement software, magazine invoicing software, and magazine advertising workflow software.
